title: chloanthes stoechadis var. glandulosa
intro: Chloanthes stoechadis var. glandulosa, also known as the glandular chloanthes, is a plant species within the Lamiaceae family, characterized by its woody stem and glandular leaves. The medicinal properties of Chloanthes stoechadis var. glandulosa include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of various compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Chloanthes stoechadis var. glandulosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
